message:
fix: use rusqlite for FTS5 operations, guard doctor mutations behind --fix

Root cause: FrankenSQLite cannot handle FTS5 virtual tables. The
`register_fts5_on_connection` workaround fails silently, causing all
code paths that probe or query `fts_messages` via FrankenSQLite to fail.

Changes:
- Doctor FTS5 probe now uses rusqlite instead of FrankenSQLite (#121/#122/#126)
- Doctor FTS5 rebuild (--fix) now uses rusqlite instead of FrankenSQLite
- FTS5 fallback search path uses rusqlite via new `search_sqlite_fts5` method
- Doctor no longer mutates state (dir creation, lock removal, rebuild)
  without --fix flag (#127)
- Doctor and stats DB open wrapped in 30s timeout to prevent hangs (#128)
- FTS probe failure no longer triggers unnecessary full rebuild (#123)

Fixes #121, #122, #123, #126, #127, #128

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
